_comment: Recorded AWS Customer Carbon Footprint Tool (CCFT) emissions (M14.16). CCFT reports in metric tons CO2e (MTCO2e == tonne) at SERVICE / REGION grain — it does not attribute to individual resources — so every row is kept at service grain (no resource id) and never fabricated to per-resource precision. Rows are keyed by days_ago so they stay inside the query window. Placeholder account 123456789012 is retargeted on ingest. Estimates only.
